briefdescription.para: The function implements the ntohll function.
This function extracts a uint32_t from a big endian byte array.
This function retrieves a handler instance.

parameterdescription.para: the key file handle to look up

simplesect.para: The corresponding handler. NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a key file handler.
This function reads a buffer of data from the key file (BRAM)

parameterdescription.para: the buffer to place the data read

briefdescription.para: This function reads a buffer of data from the key file.

parameterdescription.para: the buffer to place the data read

briefdescription.para: This function opens and validates a key file for reading.

simplesect.para: The key file handle. KEYFILE_HANDLE_NULL if an error encountered

briefdescription.para: This function closes a key file.

parameterdescription.para: a handle of the file to close

briefdescription.para: This function reads a device key table from a key file.

parameterdescription.para: a handle of the file to read from
the device key table to copy the data read
